creator: skrah@bytereef.org
text:
Created attachment 247761
update to version 4.0.0

mpdecimal-4.0.0 has been released:

https://www.bytereef.org/mpdecimal/changelog.html
https://www.bytereef.org/mpdecimal/download.html


The attached PR updates the port.


The SOVERSION has been increased to 4. I'm not sure if the following line
in, e.g., lang/python11 is sufficient to trigger a rebuild of Python:


LIBMPDEC_LIB_DEPENDS=	libmpdec.so:math/mpdecimal


Stefan Krah
